creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please copy the following files inside the port sysutils/bacula-server,
I wan't to preserve the history of the files and use additional
some vars from SUB_LIST with the next version update.

Additional I dicussed and explained the usage of 'make makepatch' to the
maintainer and he like to use this command in the future.

Fix: 

files to copy into ${FILESDIR}
===============================================================================
pkg-deinstall.client    => files/pkg-deinstall.client.in
pkg-deinstall.server    => files/pkg-deinstall.server.in
pkg-install.client      => files/pkg-install.client.in
pkg-install.server      => files/pkg-install.server.in


files to copy so the command 'make makepatch' can be used in future
===============================================================================
files/patch-src-cats-Makefile.in    => files/patch-src__cats__Makefile.in
files/patch-src-dird-Makefile.in    => files/patch-src__dird__Makefile.in
files/patch-src-findlib-Makefile.in => files/patch-src__findlib__Makefile.in
files/patch-src-lib-Makefile.in     => files/patch-src__lib__Makefile.in
files/patch-src-stored-Makefile.in  => files/patch-src__stored__Makefile.in
files/patch-src-tools-Makefile.in   => files/patch-src__tools__Makefile.in


this files will be removed with the next update (no change needed)
===============================================================================
files/patch-src-lib-crypto.c
files/patch-src-lib-tls.c
